summary: Added telegram_bug_reporter MCP and CLI dry-run/send workflow for group bug reporting with local-only Telegram token configuration.
derived_updates: OpenCode now exposes telegram_bug_reporter alongside playwright_cdp, oracle_readonly, and oracle_testdata.
Bug reports can be generated from JSON templates or direct fields, saved to 05-observability/telegram-reporting/outbox, and sent only with explicit --send or MCP send=true.
Telegram bot token and chat id are stored only in ignored local env 02-brain/.opencode/config/telegram-bug-reporter.local.env.
Chat id discovery is available through --get-updates or MCP discover_chats after the bot is added to the target group.
